notice.name: royal notice
notice.desc: "His Majesty dines at the Crown & Cup tonight. Serve ROYAL ALE and a GOLDEN LOAF upon the high table."

cellar_key.name: iron cellar key
cellar_key.desc: A heavy iron key. Fits the cellar door under the stairs.

tankard.name: empty tankard
tankard.desc: A clean pewter-bound mug. Ready for royal ale.

royal_ale.name: tankard of royal ale
royal_ale.desc: Frothy gold from the crowned cask. Fit for a king.

flour.name: sack of flour
flour.desc: Fine milled flour. The oven will know what to do.

loaf.name: golden loaf
loaf.desc: Warm, crusty, and proudly risen. Straight from the hearth.
